title: Policy: Manage Policies for Multiple Devices
scenario: Policy settings applied to multiple devices do not reflect correct locked/unlocked states when navigating to each device's settings screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Connect two or more Poly Bluetooth audio devices (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200 and Poly Voyager 4320).
Create a new policy with specific settings (e.g., disable ANC, lock Equalizer, enable Transparency Mode).
Apply the policy to both connected devices.
Navigate to Home → [Device 1 Name] → Device Settings.
Verify that the settings reflect the applied policy (e.g., ANC is disabled, Equalizer is locked, Transparency Mode is enabled).
Navigate back to Home → [Device 2 Name] → Device Settings.
Verify that the settings reflect the same applied policy (e.g., ANC is disabled, Equalizer is locked, Transparency Mode is enabled).
Check that locked settings (e.g., Equalizer) show a lock icon and cannot be changed from the app.
Check that unlocked settings (e.g., Volume) can still be adjusted freely.
expected: Each connected device's settings correctly reflect the applied policy. Locked settings are non-editable and show a lock icon. Unlocked settings remain adjustable.
